title: Trump’s approval rating hits second-term low among his Latino voters, though many still approve
summary_en: About two-thirds of Latino Trump voters (66%) approve of his job performance. That’s down 27 percentage points since the start of his second term.
title_cn: Trump’s approval rating hits second-term low among his Latino voters, though many still approve

title: A majority of Americans say the country’s best years are behind us
summary_en: Americans are also much more pessimistic (44%) than optimistic (28%) when asked to think about what things will be like in the U.S. 50 years from now.
title_cn: A majority of Americans say the country’s best years are behind us
